rows.label: qev200602_MSG0001
rows.name:
I have been waiting for you. I believe
this is our first time meeting, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev200602_SEL0011
rows.name: Confirm that you have never met before.

rows.label: qev200602_JNK0020
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev200602_SEL0021
rows.name: Claim that you have met once before.

rows.label: qev200602_JNK0030
rows.name: Strongly Disagree

rows.label: qev200602_SEL0031
rows.name:
Say that this is actually the
THIRD time you have met.

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0002
rows.name: Ha ha ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0003
rows.name:
You are very kind. Or
perhaps just gullible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0004
rows.name:
...It's me! Yardley!
Remember good ol' Yardley?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0005
rows.name:
Huh? That's not what I
expected you to say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0006
rows.name:
I thought you'd say this was
our third meeting. Maybe you
lost your memory or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0007
rows.name:
...It's me! Yardley! ...This
is our third encounter?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0008
rows.name: Heh. Aren't you the smart one?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0009
rows.name:
Well, I guess you know
it's good ol' Yardley.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0010
rows.name:
So I know you may have some
doubts, but I promise it was
always me you've been meeting with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0011
rows.name: I just...changed my appearance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0012
rows.name:
So you know that keycard
you found for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0013
rows.name:
Well, it activates the Lifepod I
worked so desperately to repair.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0014
rows.name:
You see, we humans are basically just
souls housed in Blue Bloods, which are
little more than temporary vessels.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0015
rows.name:
But with this situation comes
a kind of freedom: The freedom
to change vessels at will.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0016
rows.name:
The Blue Blood Maintenance Center is
full of Lifepods, but they're all
reserved for clinical applications.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0017
rows.name:
Us normal yokels aren't
allowed near 'em.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0018
rows.name:
Which means that this is the only
Lifepod where people can rebuild
their bodies to suit their whims.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0019
rows.name:
I expect you have your doubts
about the process, but I stand
as proof of the results.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0020
rows.name:
My consciousness has been successfully
transplanted into an entirely new body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_JNK0040
rows.name: Request

rows.label: qev200602_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask to use Yardley's Lifepod.

rows.label: qev200602_JNK0050
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev200602_SEL0051
rows.name:
Express concern that a criminal
might misuse such technology.

rows.label: qev200602_JNK0060
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev200602_SEL0061
rows.name: Compliment Yardley on his scheme.

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0021
rows.name: Pshaw! Of course! Anyone can use it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0022
rows.name:
They just have to pay a totally
reasonable service fee.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0023
rows.name: Only 1,000,000 credits! ...Per use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0024
rows.name: Oh, I wouldn't worry about that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0025
rows.name:
With my prices, it's safely
out of the reach of petty
criminals and other riffraff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0026
rows.name:
Even a kingpin would think twice
before rushing into things. I charge
a million credits a pop, after all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0027
rows.name:
I was lucky to stumble onto a
Lifepod with only minor damage
at the south end of the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0028
rows.name:
And crossing your path was another
stroke of luck, seeing as how
you've helped me out twice now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0029
rows.name:
And at the end of that string
of serendipity is my golden
opportunity to strike it rich.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0030
rows.name:
NLA's wealthiest will be
clamoring to use my machine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0031
rows.name:
Oh, but you're welcome to use
it for free whenever you want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0032
rows.name:
Let's just say it's a way to
settle up my outstanding debts.
So whaddya say? Interested?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_JNK0070
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev200602_SEL0071
rows.name:
Assure Yardley that you'll
put it to good use.

rows.label: qev200602_JNK0080
rows.name: Demand

rows.label: qev200602_SEL0081
rows.name:
Tell Yardley that you want
to be paid in cash instead.

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0033
rows.name: Wonderful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0034
rows.name: Then from this point on, we're square.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0035
rows.name:
Um, were you not listening
to what I said?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0036
rows.name:
I am ABOUT to become massively
wealthy. At the moment,
however, I am flat busted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0037
rows.name:
So do us both a favor and forget about
money for a moment. Seize this unique
opportunity to discover a new you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0038
rows.name:
Besides, others have to pay a million bones a pop, while
you get unlimited access in perpetuity for free! It's
a far greater value than some paltry cash payment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0039
rows.name:
Now just accept the offer and
enjoy the Lifepod already![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0040
rows.name: ...Phew.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0041
rows.name:
I have only two stipulations
for our agreement.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0042
rows.name:
One is that you don't
tell anybody about this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0043
rows.name:
I doubt the director general
would be pleased to hear about
my little business model.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0044
rows.name:
And two is that you only use the machine
late at night, while I'm around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0045
rows.name:
That should be a given, seeing
as it won't activate without my
keycard, but just in case.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0046
rows.name: Are we agreed?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_JNK0090
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev200602_SEL0091
rows.name: Promise to abide by Yardley's rules.

rows.label: qev200602_JNK0100
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev200602_SEL0101
rows.name:
Say that you refuse to
make any promises.

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0047
rows.name: Deal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0048
rows.name:
I hope this leads to good
things for the both of us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0049
rows.name:
Well, that's enough yakking, I
think. If you want to take the
Lifepod for a spin, step right up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0050
rows.name:
Er, yeah. No. That's
not... That doesn't work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0051
rows.name:
Okay, I admit that I cheated you out of
a reward before, but I'm being totally
upfront and fair with you right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0052
rows.name:
Look, why not try the Lifepod
for yourself right now? One
taste and you'll never go back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev200602_MSG0053
rows.name:
Now come on! Step up
and embrace a new you![ST:wait ]
